briefdescription.para: This function will set the channel IDs to correspond with the supplied channel ID based on the protocol.

detaileddescription.para: HDMI uses 3 channels; This ID translation is done to allow other functions to operate iteratively over multiple channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the channel ID used to determine the indices.
is a pointer to the start channel ID to set.
is a pointer to the end channel ID to set.

simplesect.para: The contents of Id0 and Id1 will be set according to ChId.

briefdescription.para: This function will configure the FRL REF CLK for HDMI 2.1 operation.
This function is the interrupt handler for the GT events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the clock detector events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an HDMI callback function for the specified handler type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is the interrupt handler type which specifies which interrupt event to attach the callback for.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the appropriate HDMI interrupt handlers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for events triggered by QPLL lock done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for events triggered by CPLL lock done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for events triggered by GT TX alignment done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for events triggered by GT TX reset lock done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for events triggered by GT RX reset lock done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for events triggered by a change in TX frequency as detected by the HDMI clock detector logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for events triggered by a change in RX frequency as detected by the HDMI clock detector logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for TX timer timeout events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for RX timer timeout events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for TX MMCM Lock events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler for RX MMCM Lock events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMIPHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This file contains video PHY functionality specific to the HDMI protocol related to interrupts.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
dd/mm/yy
1.0 gm 10/12/18 Initial release.
